title: Crispy Caramel Peruvian Chicken Empanadas
description: A weeknight Peruvian dish featuring crispy empanadas filled with caramel chicken, made with dark brown sugar and cooked in a bain-marie for a low-sodium friendly meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour and a pinch of salt to make the empanada dough.
In a separate bowl, mix together the dark brown sugar, chicken breast, onion, garlic, cumin, and paprika.
Add the sugar and chicken mixture to the center of the empanada dough and fold the dough over to form a triangle or circle shape.
Brush the empanadas with an egg wash and place them in a bain-marie.
Bake the empanadas in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until they are golden brown and crispy.
Remove the empanadas from the oven and let them cool for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the empanadas warm and enjoy.
